mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guide_search (guide_id, title, content, game_id, game_name, search_vec, updated_at) VALUES ( #{guideId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{gameId}, #{gameName}, setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(#{title}, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(#{gameName}, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(#{content}, '')), 'C'), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (guide_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content = EXCLUDED.content, game_id = EXCLUDED.game_id, game_name = EXCLUDED.game_name, search_vec = EXCLUDED.search_vec, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT gs.guide_id AS guideId, gs.title, ts_headline( 'simple', gs.content, plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword}), 'MaxWords=60, MinWords=20, StartSel=, StopSel=, HighlightAll=false' ) AS headline, gs.game_id AS gameId, gs.game_name AS gameName, gs.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM guide_search gs WHERE ( gs.search_vec @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword}) OR gs.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR gs.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) AND gs.game_id = #{gameId} ORDER BY ts_rank_cd(gs.search_vec, plainto_tsquery('simple', #{keyword})) DESC, gs.updated_at DESC
SELECT guide_id AS guideId, title, content, game_id AS gameId, game_name AS gameName FROM guide_search WHERE embedding IS NULL ORDER BY guide_id
